title: Leuven, Flemish Brabant — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Leuven, Flemish Brabant: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Leuven is a city in Flemish Brabant with a population of 101,000. A historic university city with one of the world’s oldest Catholic universities, a stunning Gothic town hall, and a lively beer culture.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
